stages.name: h3_analysis
stages.message:
Failed to update pipeline job stage: (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedColumn) column "updated_at" of relation "pipeline_jobs" does not exist
LINE 6:             updated_at = now()
                    ^

[SQL: 
        UPDATE pipeline_jobs
        SET current_stage = %(stage)s,
            status = COALESCE(%(status)s, status),
            metadata = COALESCE(CAST(%(metadata)s AS jsonb), metadata),
            updated_at = now()
        WHERE job_id = %(job_id)s
        RETURNING job_id;
        ]
[parameters: {'stage': 'repair', 'status': 'running', 'metadata': '{}', 'job_id': 'b2bfe02a-4c54-4b62-ab57-2121c323e0d0'}]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)
